Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compeldefts To Provide Further Responses And Production Of Documents;
Off Calendar Mar-10-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFFS NATALIA LOPEZ AND VINCENT BALISTRERI'S Motion To Compel defendants To Provide Further Responses And Production Of Documents is Denied. The 45 days limit expired, and Plaintiff had no agreement in writing for extension. The court awarded no sanctions. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported = (301/PJB)
